name: Pastel Dream
description: Soft pastel canvas with cream card and a single sage-green accent. Plus Jakarta Sans throughout, generous rounded cards. Signature: faint multi-tone pill ribbon along one edge — friendly without being saccharine.
descriptionZh: 柔粉蓝灰底 + 奶油卡 + 单一鼠尾草绿强调色 + Plus Jakarta Sans。签名：单边多色 pill 色条。友好但不腻，适合女性向 / 教学 / onboarding。
bestFor: 友好教学 / 知识科普
心理 / 健康 / 母婴
